top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.raceId, r.name, r.year, r.date
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton';

SELECT DISTINCT r.raceId, r.name, r.year, r.date
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton';

SELECT DISTINCT r.raceId, r.name AS race_name, r.year, r.date, r.time
FROM races r
INNER JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
INNER JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton';

SELECT DISTINCT r.raceId, r.name, r.year, r.date
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton';

SELECT DISTINCT r.raceId, r.name AS race_name, r.year, r.date, r.time
FROM races r
INNER JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
INNER JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.raceId, r.name, r.year, r.date
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton';
